docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, TAD AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TAD NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDWIN GARCIA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF OF CLAIM, SC-104 FEE FOR SERVICE: 30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD SERVED MAR-06-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, EDWIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, EDWIN $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,280.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR REGARDING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, EDWIN
